note: Inspiration feeds Kariim pulls from. These are galleries/dashboards (many sites each) or image boards, NOT single sites. Harvest galleries in --links mode (mine for site URLs, then harvest the good ones). Dashboards need Kariim's logged-in browser session. Image boards give moodboard references, not palette-from-live-site cards.

sources.note: Awwwards Sites of the Day — PRIMARY feed. Paginated. Mine for the featured site links, harvest a reasonable batch.
Awwwards Sites of the Week — PRIMARY feed. The week's standouts.
Awwwards Sites of the Year — PRIMARY feed. The annual best (e.g. Messenger, SOTY 2025).
Awwwards Sites of the Month — PRIMARY feed. Monthly standouts (e.g. Bruno Simon Jan 2026).
recent.design feed (Godly-style). Public. Mine for outbound site links.
Dribbble shots are mostly images; some link to live sites. Use for moodboard + follow through to real site URLs where present. Search 'web design' for on-topic shots.
Wix 'inspiring websites' gallery — behind Kariim's Wix account login. Needs his browser session; a headless fetch hits a login wall.
Kariim's own Lovable project dashboard — behind his login, and it's his projects, not a public gallery. Point at specific published project URLs to harvest those.
Twitter/X web-design posts. Often auth-gated and JS-heavy. Treat as image/link moodboard; follow through to real site URLs to harvest as cards.
Pinterest web-design pins are images, not sites. Use as visual moodboard (save images for direction), not palette-from-live-site extraction.
